text: Productive cough and slightly short of breath climbing stairs. 4 day(s) like this, and I feel more unwell than yesterday. I can't catch my breath.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: My breathing is really laboured. Chest pain, high fever, can't stop coughing up phlegm. 7 day(s), deteriorating, and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/severe
